name: care-gaps-panel
title: Care Gaps Panel
description: Open care gaps as a panel, overdue-first so the most actionable items lead. Composes WidgetPanel + CareGapItem.

props.name: items
props.description: Care gaps; each is a CareGapItem's props (+ optional id).

props.name: ...WidgetPanel
props.description: title, icon, action, info, state, empty pass through.

clinicalNotes: Sort order is the whole point of a gaps panel — overdue must lead so a clinician closes the highest-value items first; this panel sorts by status automatically. Uses the warning tone to signal 'attention needed' without alarming. The empty state ('all up to date') is a genuinely positive signal in preventive care, so it is derived and shown rather than leaving a blank card.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Consumer and Provider blocks.
